description: Real HIP99427 GBT cadence evidence groups labeled under a deterministic citizen-science reproducibility protocol.
disclaimer: These labels are conservative citizen-science operational annotations derived from cadence behavior. They are not expert labels, external validation, detections, discoveries, or authorization for external submission.

entries.notes: Operational cadence label only; no astrophysical source attribution or technosignature claim.
